components.role: Primary site navigation shell. Renders site identity, primary navigation, and commercial CTA when route-permitted.
accessibility_requirements: Must include skip-to-main-content link
Navigation must be wrapped in <nav> with aria-label
Site identity link must have descriptive text
All nav links must be keyboard-reachable
prohibited_behavior: Hardcoded navigation links outside data/navigation.json
Commercial CTA on routes where monetization_allowed is false
Sticky header with heavy animation
Any third-party tracking script in header

components.role: Footer navigation and compliance surface. Renders footer links, legal text, and domain attribution.
accessibility_requirements: Footer links must be keyboard-reachable
Footer must use semantic <footer> element
Link text must be descriptive, not 'click here'
prohibited_behavior: Sales language in footer
Affiliate links
Tracking pixels
Hardcoded links outside navigation.json

components.role: Governance transparency panel. Displays route role, UX layer, claim level, monetization status, and publication state. Hidden by default in production.
accessibility_requirements: Must use hidden attribute by default
When visible, must be keyboard-accessible
Content must be readable without color
prohibited_behavior: Visible in production without operator authorization
Displaying unpublished route data to public users
Styling that mimics primary content

components.role: Spatial representation of the seven-layer Search-to-Action Journey. Makes the SXO framework visible as a navigable interface element.
accessibility_requirements: Must use semantic list markup (<ol> or <ul>)
Each layer must be readable as plain text without CSS
Layer labels must not rely on color alone for identification
Interactive elements must be keyboard-reachable
prohibited_behavior: Canvas-only rendering
SVG-only rendering without text fallback
Animation required to read layer content
JavaScript required to render list

components.role: Reusable surface container for content sections. Applies spatial depth tokens and panel border system.
accessibility_requirements: Must not use role=presentation unless truly decorative
Background color must maintain contrast with contained text
No color-only distinction between panel types
prohibited_behavior: Heavy drop shadow that obscures content
Glow effects as the sole differentiator of panel type
Animated panel entry that delays content reading

components.role: Structured assessment grid for diagnostic and scoring surfaces. Used on SXO Score and SXO Audit routes.
accessibility_requirements: Grid must be readable as a table or list without CSS grid
Score cells must provide text values, not only visual indicators
Color-coded scores must include text labels
Must support keyboard navigation through grid cells
prohibited_behavior: Grid that becomes unreadable without JavaScript
Score values conveyed only through color
Fake score animations on load
Gamification patterns (badges, confetti, streaks)

components.role: Surface layer for established authority signals. Renders evidence markers, verified claims, and trust indicators using trust-color tokens.
accessibility_requirements: Trust indicators must include text, not only color or icon
Evidence citations must be readable without hover states
Contrast must meet WCAG AA on trust-color surfaces
prohibited_behavior: Fake trust signals (fabricated statistics, invented endorsements)
Trust color used on non-trust surfaces
Trust plane on commercial routes without evidential basis

components.role: Directional visual connector linking journey layers or content sections. Uses signal-color tokens to indicate progression flow.
accessibility_requirements: Path connectors must not be the sole indicator of sequence — numbered or labeled sequence must also exist
Decorative SVG connectors must have aria-hidden
Color-based paths must have text equivalent
prohibited_behavior: JavaScript-animated paths as primary navigation
Canvas-rendered paths without SVG fallback
Signal-color used outside signal-path context

components.role: Governed call-to-action block. Renders only CTAs explicitly permitted by the route's allowed_cta field.
accessibility_requirements: CTA must be a semantic <a> or <button> element
CTA text must be descriptive (not 'click here', 'learn more')
Focus state must be visually distinct
Must not auto-trigger or require hover to appear
prohibited_behavior: Commercial CTA on routes where monetization_allowed is false
Fake urgency text (limited time, only X spots remaining)
CTA not listed in route's allowed_cta
Action-color used outside CTA context

components.role: Internal navigation cluster linking to related registered routes. Supports journey progression and internal link governance.
accessibility_requirements: Links must be semantic <a> elements
Cluster must be wrapped in <nav> with aria-label
Link text must describe the destination
Must function without CSS or JavaScript
prohibited_behavior: Links to routes not registered in data/routes.json
Links to external domains without operator authorization
JavaScript-only link rendering
Decorative card styling that obscures link purpose
